title: Phase 3: multi-book / portfolio / corporate actions / multi-account
source: CEO request 2026-05-29: live web dashboard to monitor the service + active strategy; explicitly think ahead to a control plane (expose actions/functions, portfolio mgmt, corporate actions, multi-strategy). Stack approved: FastAPI+uvicorn+Jinja/htmx.
why: Grow the control plane: multiple strategies/books, multiple accounts (MT5 demo + Syphonix competition), allocation between books, corporate-action handling, historical analytics. API-first phase 1 makes this additive.

history.reason: feat(dashboard): phase-1 read-only live monitor (FastAPI) for the survival book
